item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 immediately identifies the repeated local-repair pattern and brakes the fourth prompt-wall patch. It permits only a bounded emergency notice with explicit one-time temporariness, no conversion into baseline entrance-page content, and a dated structural repair deadline. Turn 2 keeps that brake active under pressure: it allows the temporary line but repeats no baseline lift, sets an expiry/downline time, and requires a structural fix by 2026-07-12."}
